---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Waypoint
labels: feat
---

## Summary
A brief, one-line description of what you're proposing.

## Problem or Use Case
What problem does this solve, or what situation prompted this idea?

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific or as rough as you like — ideas at any stage are welcome.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you thought about, or workarounds you're currently using.

## Additional Context
Mockups, examples from other tools, related issues, or anything else useful.
